name: Mato Grosso do Sul (Brazil)

colors.symbolism: the sky over Mato Grosso do Sul

description: A white field charged with a large light-blue triangle in the upper fly and a smaller green triangle in the upper hoist; a single yellow five-pointed star is set within the blue triangle near the fly.
history: Adopted on 1 January 1979, when Mato Grosso do Sul was created by the splitting of the southern part of Mato Grosso under Complementary Law No. 31 of 1977.

features.role: blue triangle covering the upper fly
green triangle in the upper hoist

features.symbolism: the new state of Mato Grosso do Sul
